languages.text: "После победы над Диодасом я возжелал величия для своей династии. Одного лишь меча было недостаточно. Я был уверен, что склеп скрывает еще много тайн, разгадав которые я мог бы сделать фон Валанциусов самым могущественным домом Вольных Торговцев в Просторе Коронус! И я был прав..." {n}Ваш предок затихает, его тусклый, невидящий взгляд направлен мимо вас.{/n} "Но моя уверенность и сгубила меня. В руинах я нашел портал в логово мерзкого ксеноса Тразина".

traits.locale_text: "После победы над Диодасом я возжелал величия для своей династии. Одного лишь меча было недостаточно. Я был уверен, что склеп скрывает еще много тайн, разгадав которые я мог бы сделать фон Валанциусов самым могущественным домом Вольных Торговцев в Просторе Коронус! И я был прав..." {n}Ваш предок затихает, его тусклый, невидящий взгляд направлен мимо вас.{/n} "Но моя уверенность и сгубила меня. В руинах я нашел портал в логово мерзкого ксеноса Тразина".

languages.text: "After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A sword alone was not enough. I was certain the crypt concealed many more secrets, and by unravelling them I could make von Valancius the most powerful Rogue Trader house in the Koronus Expanse. And I was right..." {n}Your ancestor falls silent, his blank, unfocused gaze directed past you.{/n} "But it was that very confidence that undid me. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."

И я был прав..." {n}Ваш предок затихает, его тусклый, невидящий взгляд направлен мимо вас.{/n} "Но моя уверенность и сгубила меня. В руинах я нашел портал в логово мерзкого ксеноса Тразина".

traits.locale_text: "After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A single sword was insufficient. I was certain the crypt concealed many more secrets, and by unravelling them I could make the von Valancius the most powerful Rogue Trader house in the Koronus Expanse. And I was right..." {n}Your ancestor falls silent, his dim, unseeing gaze directed past you.{/n} "But it was that very confidence that undid me. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."

"After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A sword alone was not enough. I was certain the crypt concealed many more secrets, and by unravelling them I could make von Valancius the most powerful Rogue Trader house in the Koronus Expanse. And I was right..." {n}Your ancestor falls silent, his blank, unfocused gaze directed past you.{/n} "But it was that very confidence that undid me. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."

languages.text: "Nach meinem Sieg über Diodas strebte ich nach Größe für meine Dynastie. Ein Schwert allein war nicht genug. Ich war mir sicher, ich würde in der Krypta noch viele andere Geheimnisse finden, um Haus von Valancius zur mächtigsten Freihandelsdynastie der Koronus-Ausdehnung zu machen. Und ich hatte recht ..." {n}Dein Ahnherr verstummt und schaut mit seinem ausdrucksleeren Blick an dir vorbei.{/n} "Aber ausgerechnet diese Zuversicht war mein Untergang. Ich entdeckte in den Ruinen ein Portal, das zum Hort des niederträchtigen Xenos Trazyn führte."
languages.original_text: "After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A sword alone was not enough. I was certain the crypt concealed many more secrets, and by unravelling them I could make von Valancius the most powerful Rogue Trader house in the Koronus Expanse. And I was right..." {n}Your ancestor falls silent, his blank, unfocused gaze directed past you.{/n} "But it was that very confidence that undid me. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."

traits.locale_text: "Nach meinem Sieg über Diodas strebte ich nach Größe für meine Dynastie. Ein Schwert allein war nicht genug. Ich war mir sicher, ich würde in der Krypta noch viele andere Geheimnisse finden, um Haus von Valancius zur mächtigsten Freihandelsdynastie der Koronus-Ausdehnung zu machen. Und ich hatte recht ..." {n}Dein Ahnherr verstummt und schaut mit seinem ausdrucksleeren Blick an dir vorbei.{/n} "Aber ausgerechnet diese Zuversicht war mein Untergang. Ich entdeckte in den Ruinen ein Portal, das zum Hort des niederträchtigen Xenos Trazyn führte."

languages.text: « Après ma victoire contre Diodas, je rêvais de grandeur pour ma dynastie, et une simple épée n'y suffisait pas. J'étais certain que la crypte renfermait encore bien des secrets et qu'en les exhumant, je pourrais faire des von Valancius la plus puissante maison de libres-marchands de toutes les Étendues de Koronus. Et j'avais raison... » {n}Votre ancêtre se tait, le regard perdu dans le vide.{/n} « Mais c'est cette même confiance qui aura fini par causer ma perte. Au beau milieu des ruines, j'ai trouvé un portail menant tout droit au repaire de l'ignoble xénos Trazyn. »
languages.original_text: "After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A sword alone was not enough. I was certain the crypt concealed many more secrets, and by unravelling them I could make von Valancius the most powerful Rogue Trader house in the Koronus Expanse. And I was right..." {n}Your ancestor falls silent, his blank, unfocused gaze directed past you.{/n} "But it was that very confidence that undid me. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."

traits.locale_text: « Après ma victoire contre Diodas, je rêvais de grandeur pour ma dynastie, et une simple épée n'y suffisait pas. J'étais certain que la crypte renfermait encore bien des secrets et qu'en les exhumant, je pourrais faire des von Valancius la plus puissante maison de libres-marchands de toutes les Étendues de Koronus. Et j'avais raison... » {n}Votre ancêtre se tait, le regard perdu dans le vide.{/n} « Mais c'est cette même confiance qui aura fini par causer ma perte. Au beau milieu des ruines, j'ai trouvé un portail menant tout droit au repaire de l'ignoble xénos Trazyn. »

languages.text: «Tras mi victoria sobre Diodas, ansiaba la grandeza para mi dinastía. No me bastaba una simple espada. Estaba seguro de que la cripta encerraba muchos más secretos, y de que al desentrañarlos convertiría a la casa von Valancius en los Comerciantes Independientes más poderosos de la Extensión de Koronus. Tenía razón...». {n}Tu antepasado guarda silencio y dirige hacia ti una mirada ausente.{/n} «Pero fue esa misma confianza la que acabó conmigo. Entre las ruinas, encontré un portal que llevaba a la guarida del terrible xenos Trazyn».
languages.original_text: "After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A sword alone was not enough. I was certain the crypt concealed many more secrets, and by unravelling them I could make von Valancius the most powerful Rogue Trader house in the Koronus Expanse. And I was right..." {n}Your ancestor falls silent, his blank, unfocused gaze directed past you.{/n} "But it was that very confidence that undid me. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."

traits.locale_text: «Tras mi victoria sobre Diodas, ansiaba la grandeza para mi dinastía. No me bastaba una simple espada. Estaba seguro de que la cripta encerraba muchos más secretos, y de que al desentrañarlos convertiría a la casa von Valancius en los Comerciantes Independientes más poderosos de la Extensión de Koronus. Tenía razón...». {n}Tu antepasado guarda silencio y dirige hacia ti una mirada ausente.{/n} «Pero fue esa misma confianza la que acabó conmigo. Entre las ruinas, encontré un portal que llevaba a la guarida del terrible xenos Trazyn».

languages.text: "Diodas'a karşı kazandığım zaferden sonra hanedanlığım için yücelik arzuladım. Kılıç, tek başına yeterli değildi. Mezarın çok daha fazla sır sakladığına emindim ve bunları çözerek von Valanciusları Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en güçlü Hür Tacir hanesi yapabilirdim. Haklıydım da..." {n}Atan susuyor. Boş, odaklanmamış bakışları uzaklara dalıyor.{/n} "Ancak beni mahveden de tam olarak bu düşünceydi. Harabelerin arasında iğrenç zeno Trazyn'in inine giden bir geçit buldum."
languages.original_text: "After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A sword alone was not enough. I was certain the crypt concealed many more secrets, and by unravelling them I could make von Valancius the most powerful Rogue Trader house in the Koronus Expanse. And I was right..." {n}Your ancestor falls silent, his blank, unfocused gaze directed past you.{/n} "But it was that very confidence that undid me. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."

traits.locale_text: "Diodas'a karşı kazandığım zaferden sonra hanedanlığım için yücelik arzuladım. Kılıç, tek başına yeterli değildi. Mezarın çok daha fazla sır sakladığına emindim ve bunları çözerek von Valanciusları Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en güçlü Hür Tacir hanesi yapabilirdim. Haklıydım da..." {n}Atan susuyor. Boş, odaklanmamış bakışları uzaklara dalıyor.{/n} "Ancak beni mahveden de tam olarak bu düşünceydi. Harabelerin arasında iğrenç zeno Trazyn'in inine giden bir geçit buldum."

languages.text: “在击败狄奥达斯之后，我渴望为王朝建立更宏大的伟业。光凭一把剑是不够的。我确信那座墓穴中还藏着更多秘密，只要揭开它们，就能让冯·瓦兰修斯成为科罗努斯扩区最强大的行商浪人家族。而我也确实没猜错……”{n}你的先祖陷入沉默，空洞的目光越过你，望向远方。{/n}“但正是那份自信毁了我。在废墟之中，我发现了一道传送门，直通那卑劣异形特拉金的巢穴。”
languages.original_text: "After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A sword alone was not enough. I was certain the crypt concealed many more secrets, and by unravelling them I could make von Valancius the most powerful Rogue Trader house in the Koronus Expanse. And I was right..." {n}Your ancestor falls silent, his blank, unfocused gaze directed past you.{/n} "But it was that very confidence that undid me. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."

traits.locale_text: “在击败狄奥达斯之后，我渴望为王朝建立更宏大的伟业。光凭一把剑是不够的。我确信那座墓穴中还藏着更多秘密，只要揭开它们，就能让冯·瓦兰修斯成为科罗努斯扩区最强大的行商浪人家族。而我也确实没猜错……”{n}你的先祖陷入沉默，空洞的目光越过你，望向远方。{/n}“但正是那份自信毁了我。在废墟之中，我发现了一道传送门，直通那卑劣异形特拉金的巢穴。”

languages.text: 「ディオダスを倒した後、私は自分の王朝に偉大さを求めた。ただ剣だけでは足りなかった。この地下墓地には、もっと多くの秘密が隠されていると確信していた。その秘密を解き明かして、フォン・ヴァランキウス家をコーロナス・エクスパンションで最も強力なローグ・トレーダー家にするのだ。そして、私は正しいことをしていた…」{n}祖先が沈黙し、あなたの先を通り抜けるようにぼんやりとした視線を向ける。{/n}「しかし、その自信が私の破滅を招いた。廃墟の中で、私は邪悪な異星種族トラズンの巣窟への門を見つけたのだ。」
languages.original_text: "After my victory over Diodas, I craved greatness for my dynasty. A sword alone was not enough. Among the ruins, I found a portal leading to the lair of the vile xenos Trazyn."
